facts.speaking_challenge: gets nervous during conversations and sometimes forgets what to say

events.what: made a grammatical mistake at the bank; said 'I'll transfer the money' instead of 'I can transfer'; manager was not happy; felt very embarrassed

moments.text: I feel like such a desh khaliya (fool) sometimes

anticipation_queue.content: Ask about "made a grammatical mistake at the bank; said 'I'll transfer the money' instead of 'I can transfer'; manager was not happy; felt very embarrassed" — today
Gently check in: "I feel like such a desh khaliya (fool) sometimes" (tone: anxious)

Celebrate concretely: correctly used 'can' in multiple offer/request contexts during bank conversation role-play (e.g. "Can I help you with the loan application process? / Can I get the application form here?")
Celebrate concretely: demonstrated growing confidence and self-awareness through practice (e.g. "went from anxious about mistake to 'I think I got it! I feel more confident now'")

examples: I'll transfer the money to your account
